description_long: This is an adult woman standing with her arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a fitted zip-up jacket, slim pants, and flat shoes. Her hair is medium-length, styled in loose waves that frame her face and fall to her shoulders. The figure has a naturalistic body shape and proportions, with visible facial features and hands. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and simple.
description: An adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a zip-up jacket, slim pants, and flat shoes, with medium-length wavy hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, jacket zipper, and both arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, body, and arm.
description_view_2: Back view showing the back of the jacket, pants, and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view with the profile of the face, body, and arm visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
